name: Zeal Palace
description: The grand palace at the center of the Kingdom of Zeal, where Queen Zeal and her children reside. The palace is a massive structure of blue and white crystal that sparkles with magical energy. At its heart lies the Mammon Machine, which channels power directly from Lavos. The halls are adorned with floating orbs of light and intricate magical glyphs. The throne room dominates the central tower, while private chambers branch off into the eastern and western wings.
